system.notes: The Powered Armor Trooper's special combat ability (Maximum Metal p.52). Its level is added to a powered-armor suit's Initiative and caps the Martial Arts skill usable while operating a suit; a Solo's ordinary Combat Sense does NOT apply while in powered armor.

cp2020-augmented.provenance: Maximum Metal p.52 — the Powered Armor Trooper's special ability (added to a suit's Initiative; caps the Martial Arts skill usable in a suit; ordinary Combat Sense does not apply in powered armor). Added as a REF role skill for the Augmented ACPA rules.
